message:
feat(providers): add native OAuth support for OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini CLI, and Google Antigravity

Extends pi_agent_rust's multi-provider architecture to support three new
OAuth-authenticated provider backends, enabling seamless use of ChatGPT's
Codex Responses API, Google Cloud Code Assist (Gemini CLI), and Google
Antigravity alongside the existing Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google Gemini
providers.

## OAuth Authentication (src/auth.rs)

- Add OAuth constants for OpenAI Codex (PKCE flow via auth.openai.com),
  Google Gemini CLI (Google OAuth with Cloud Code Assist scopes), and
  Google Antigravity (Google OAuth with extended scopes including cclog
  and experimentsandconfigs)
- Implement start/complete OAuth flow functions for each new provider
- Add project-scoped access token encoding/decoding for Google providers
  (JSON payload with token + projectId)
- Extend token refresh to handle google-gemini-cli and google-antigravity
  credentials, extracting projectId from the encoded access token payload
- Add external credential auto-detection: resolve API keys from locally
  installed Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI credential stores
- Add has_stored_credential() and external_setup_source() to AuthStorage
  for checking credential availability without resolving keys

## Provider Backends

### OpenAI Codex Responses (src/providers/openai_responses.rs)
- Add Codex mode with chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex/responses endpoint
- Extract chatgpt_account_id from JWT claims for required header
- Add OpenAI-Beta, originator, User-Agent, and session_id headers
- Handle response.done and response.failed SSE event types that Codex
  emits in addition to the standard response.completed

### Google Gemini CLI / Antigravity (src/providers/gemini.rs)
- Add Google Cloud Code Assist mode using v1internal:streamGenerateContent
  endpoint instead of the standard models/{model}:streamGenerateContent
- Build CloudCodeAssistRequest wrapper with project, model, userAgent,
  requestId, and optional requestType fields
- Decode project-scoped access tokens to extract bearer token and project
  ID for Authorization header and request body
- Support both google-gemini-cli (cloudcode-pa.googleapis.com) and
  google-antigravity (daily-cloudcode-pa.sandbox.googleapis.com) base URLs

### Anthropic OAuth (src/providers/anthropic.rs)
- Detect sk-ant-oat prefixed OAuth tokens and switch from X-API-Key to
  Bearer Authorization with anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access and
  x-app headers plus oauth-2025-04-20 beta flag
- Add tests verifying OAuth vs API key header selection and beta flag
  composition when prompt caching is also enabled

## Provider Routing (src/providers/mod.rs)
- Add NativeOpenAICodexResponses, ApiOpenAICodexResponses,
  NativeGoogleGeminiCli, and ApiGoogleGeminiCli route variants
- Wire create_provider() to instantiate providers with correct mode flags,
  API names, and base URL normalization
- Add normalize_openai_codex_responses_base() for ChatGPT backend URLs

## Model Catalog & Autocomplete

### Model Registry (src/models.rs)
- Parse legacy TypeScript model catalog (models.generated.ts) via json5
  with satisfies-type-annotation stripping and OnceLock caching
- Parse upstream provider model ID snapshot JSON for tab-completion of
  model identifiers not yet in the legacy catalog
- Add model_autocomplete_candidates() returning slug + description pairs
  for all known models across all providers
- Add API-specific base URL fallbacks for codex-responses, gemini-cli,
  and antigravity endpoints

### Autocomplete (src/autocomplete.rs)
- Add Model autocomplete kind with robot emoji indicator
- Implement /model and /m argument completion against model catalog
- Implement /login and /logout argument completion against provider
  metadata (canonical IDs + aliases)
- Add tests for model, login, and logout argument suggestions

## Interactive UX (src/interactive.rs, src/interactive/commands.rs, src/interactive/view.rs)
- Expand BUILTIN_LOGIN_PROVIDERS from 3 to 8 entries including all new
  OAuth providers
- Add startup OAuth hint showing unconfigured priority providers when no
  credentials are detected at launch
- Wire /login and /logout flows for openai-codex, google-gemini-cli, and
  google-antigravity with their respective OAuth start/complete functions
- Show external credential auto-detection source in /login provider listing
- Add tests for startup hint visibility and copy

## Provider Metadata (src/provider_metadata.rs)
- Register openai-codex (aliases: codex, chatgpt-codex), google-gemini-cli
  (alias: gemini-cli), and google-antigravity (alias: antigravity) with
  NativeAdapterRequired onboarding mode

## API Types (src/provider.rs)
- Add OpenAICodexResponses variant to the Api enum with round-trip
  serialization and proptest coverage

## Dependencies
- Add json5 0.4.1 for parsing TypeScript object literals in the legacy
  model catalog
- Update Cargo.lock accordingly
- Bump legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono submodule to include latest model
  definitions referenced by include_str!()

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
